series_metadata.series_description: Various payment types (checks, credit cards, etc.) issued for payment of services are returned by the bank and remain unpaid. The Tax Distribution Section is notified, and a letter is sent to the customer requesting payment. If payment is not received within 45 days, the claim is forwarded to the office of the Attorney General for collection assistance.

retention_rules.trigger_event: Paper: returned item has been paid in full and cleared through office of Attorney General. thereafter providing audited by Auditor of State and audit report released. If unpaid, 60 years from date entered into Returned Payment System
